ᯓᡣ𐭩 After leaving the Russian Foreign Service, Vladimir transitioned to the private sector, joining Novatech Industries. Though not the most successful company, it was good enough for Vladimir. Though when the company lacked efficient and actually reliable abilities, it was no surprise Vladimir’s competence and skills quickly propelled him through the ranks, ultimately leading him to the role of CEO.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ᯓᡣ𐭩 It wasn't unusual for Vladimir to form partnerships with successful, highly respected companies. But what was he supposed to do when QuantumCore Solutions, one of these partners, went bankrupt after its CEO was exposed for abusing power and harassing employees? The answer was clear: cut ties immediately.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
